title: Ask My
subtitle: An AI assistant trained on Shuaib's complete profile — experience, projects, skills, and achievements. Ask anything and get precise, grounded answers in seconds.
welcomeMessage: Hi! I'm Shuaib's AI assistant, powered by RAG. I have full context on his work experience, skills, projects, and background. What would you like to know?
disclaimer: Responses are grounded in Shuaib's profile data. Questions outside this scope are politely declined.

suggestions.label: Top Skills
suggestions.q: What are his top technical skills?

suggestions.label: AI/ML Experience
suggestions.q: Summarize his AI and ML engineering experience

suggestions.label: AI Projects
suggestions.q: What AI projects has he built?

suggestions.label: LangChain & RAG
suggestions.q: Does he have experience with LangChain and RAG pipelines?

suggestions.label: Backend & APIs
suggestions.q: Describe his backend and API development experience

suggestions.label: Tech Stack
suggestions.q: What is his complete technology stack?
